subject: Retraction of GCN Circ. 15020 (GRB 130722C Tiled Swift observations)
body:
K.L. Page and C.J. Mountford (U. Leicester) report on behalf of the
Swift-XRT team:

GCN Circ. 15020, stating that Swift was performing tiled observations of
GRB 130722C, was the result of a system error. There is no GRB 130722C. We
apologise for any inconvenience caused.
